archetype: 5 (Luxury / Deep Space Tech) mixed with 4 (Swiss / High-Contrast)

scale.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl tracking-tighter font-medium text-white leading-tight
scale.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl tracking-tight font-medium text-white leading-tight
scale.label: text-xs tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-white/50 font-mono

surfaces.glass_card: bg-white/[0.02] backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/[0.05] rounded-3xl shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)]
surfaces.glowing_card: relative overflow-hidden bg-white/[0.02] border border-white/[0.05] rounded-3xl before:absolute before:inset-0 before:bg-gradient-to-br before:from-indigo-500/10 before:to-transparent before:opacity-0 hover:before:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-500

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black font-medium px-6 py-3 rounded-full hover:bg-white/90 transition-all shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,255,255,0.3)] hover:scale-105 active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white/[0.05] text-white border border-white/[0.1] font-medium px-6 py-3 rounded-full hover:bg-white/[0.1] transition-all
buttons.magnetic_effect: Implement framer-motion magnetic hover effect on main CTAs

components.inputs: bg-[#13131A] border border-white/[0.1] rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-white placeholder:text-white/40 focus:border-indigo-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-indigo-500 transition-all
components.badges: bg-indigo-500/10 text-indigo-400 border border-indigo-500/20 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-mono

motion.page_transitions: framer-motion AnimatePresence with opacity and slight Y translation
motion.scroll_reveal: framer-motion whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} viewport={{ once: true, margin: '-100px' }}
motion.micro_interactions: Scale button down to 0.95 on tap. Add hover glow effects by shifting background positions.
motion.ai_brain: Use HTML5 Canvas for a neural network particle system. Particles connected by lines, moving slowly. Blue/Purple colored particles to match brand.

images.description: Dynamic abstract depiction of digital circuits with vivid lights and glowing lines. Put this behind the AI brain canvas, very low opacity.
Abstract blue lines and dots on black background. Use as texture for feature cards.
Student studying in dark mode. Use in 'Why we are different' or testimonials.

landing.instructions: Huge text. Animated learning flow text cycle. Background needs to have the canvas-based neural brain visualization. Dark background #0A0A0F fading into gradient.
Bento box split. Left: Traditional AI (boring gray text). Right: ZelMinds AI (glowing bubbles, storytelling UI, rich media). Use Framer Motion for the chat bubbles appearing.
Comparison cards. Hover effects to glow borders.
Vertical or horizontal animated timeline connecting nodes. Nodes light up on scroll.
8 bento box floating cards. Glassmorphism bg-white/[0.02] with subtle internal gradient.
Animated counters using framer motion. Large Typography (Outfit).
Modern glass cards sliding horizontally or masonry.
Centered, high impact. 'Education Should Create Thinkers, Not Answer Machines.' White primary button.

dashboard.instructions: Minimal vertical nav. Lucide icons. Highlight active state with Indigo tint.
Top bar with XP/Streak. Cards for Subjects. Main area: AI Learning Companion chat interface (Claude Sonnet 4.5 demo). Weekly goals list.

auth.instructions: Clean split screen. Left side: Form with glowing inputs. Right side: Dynamic abstract background or AI brain canvas snippet.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use framer-motion heavily for scroll reveals, layout animations, and hover states.
Do not use three.js; build the neural brain via HTML5 canvas and JS requestAnimationFrame.
Import fonts via Google Fonts (Outfit, Manrope, Space Mono). Ensure proper tailwind config mapping.
Use Shadcn UI components for complex interactive pieces (Dialog, Tabs, Select) in the LMS Dashboard, but strip Vercel styles and apply the glassmorphism/dark theme described in surfaces.
Add data-testid to all actionable items.
Implement pure dark mode layout. No light mode toggle needed based on the brief.
